title: Quarterly Business Review Report
shortDescription: Generate an executive-ready QBR document with metrics performance, OKR results, learnings, and next-quarter recommendations.
jobsToBeDone: Present a comprehensive quarterly performance review to leadership
Synthesize metrics, OKR outcomes, and qualitative learnings
Justify next-quarter priorities with data from the current quarter
Identify systemic issues and propose structural improvements

inputs.label: Product Area
inputs.example: Growth & Activation — responsible for signup flow, onboarding, trial-to-paid conversion, and first-week engagement

inputs.label: OKR Results
inputs.example: O1: Increase trial-to-paid conversion (KR1: 12%→18% conversion — achieved 16.2%; KR2: Reduce time-to-value from 4.2 days to 2 days — achieved 2.8 days; KR3: Launch personalized onboarding — shipped Feb 15, 72% completion rate). O2: Reduce first-week churn (KR1: 35%→25% — achieved 28%; KR2: Implement re-engagement email series — shipped, 22% reactivation rate; KR3: Add in-app guidance — descoped, pushed to Q2)

inputs.label: Key Metrics Performance
inputs.example: New signups: 14,200 (target 15,000, -5%). Trial-to-paid: 16.2% (target 18%, +35% vs last Q). MRR: $52,400→$68,100 (+30%). Activation rate: 61% (target 70%). NPS: 48→54. Support tickets: +12% (concern)

inputs.label: Notable Events & Learnings
inputs.example: Personalized onboarding A/B test showed 3.2x improvement for enterprise users but only 1.1x for SMB. Google OAuth launch drove 40% signup increase. Pricing page redesign caused 8% drop in conversions (reverted after 2 weeks). Lost 2 enterprise deals to competitor's SSO feature we don't have. Key engineer left mid-quarter, delayed in-app guidance by 3 weeks

inputs.label: Next Quarter Context & Priorities
inputs.example: Company goal: reach $1M ARR by end of Q3. Engineering capacity: adding 1 senior engineer. Key bets: SSO for enterprise, onboarding V2 for SMB segment, pricing experimentation. Constraints: no new headcount beyond approved hire, CEO wants to see enterprise traction
